name: Shreyansh Tiwari
headline: Backend Developer • Competitive Programmer • AI Enthusiast
bio: I am Shreyansh Tiwari, a Computer Science Engineering undergraduate at the National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra. I am passionate about backend development, distributed systems, competitive programming, and artificial intelligence. I enjoy building scalable applications, designing efficient systems, and solving challenging algorithmic problems. My goal is to create software that is reliable, high-performance, and impactful while continuously learning modern technologies and best engineering practices.
careerObjective: To build scalable and efficient software systems while working on challenging engineering problems. I aspire to contribute to high-impact products, learn from experienced engineers, and continuously improve my technical and problem-solving abilities.
